endorsement_reason: The claim about the writer quoted by Merriam-Webster for the Word of the Day from June 27, 2022, being William Shakespeare is accurate.
Both reports agree on the writer quoted by Merriam-Webster for the Word of the Day on June 27, 2022, being William Shakespeare.
The claim correctly identifies William Faulkner as the quoted writer for the Word of the Day from June 27, 2022.
